journey.name: History Screen Verification
journey.description: Verify the History screen shows entries and interactions work correctly. iOS parity: HistoryTests (empty state, day card expand, meal sections, calorie totals)

actions.action: Tap the "History" tab in the bottom navigation bar
Verify the History screen is displayed with a list of day cards
Verify a day card shows today's date and a calorie total of 450
Tap on the day card for today
Verify the card expands to show meal sections
Verify "Chicken Salad" appears in the expanded card under the meal section
Verify "450" calories is shown for the entry
Tap on the day card again to collapse it
Verify the entry details are no longer visible
Tap the "Dashboard" tab to return to the dashboard
